mapper.select: select od.* from eb_order_detail od left join eb_order o on o.order_no = od.order_no and o.status in (5,6) and o.is_user_del = 0 and o.level = 1 where od.is_receipt = 1 and od.is_reply = #{isReply} and od.uid = #{userId} and o.second_type in (0,2,5,6,7,8) order by od.id desc

select od.* from eb_order_detail od left join eb_order o on o.order_no = od.order_no where od.uid = #{uid} and od.product_type in (0,2,7,8) and od.verify_total_times = od.verify_remaining_times and od.pro_refund_switch = 1 and (od.verify_end_date is null or od.verify_end_date = '' or CURDATE() <= DATE(od.verify_end_date)) and o.status not in (0,6,9) and o.is_user_del = 0 and o.level = 1 and o.refund_status < 3 and (od.apply_refund_num + od.refund_num) < od.pay_num and o.group_buy_record_status in (10,99)
and (od.order_no = #{keywords} or od.product_name like CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%'))
order by od.id desc

select count(*) from eb_order_detail od left join eb_order o on o.order_no = od.order_no and o.status in (5,6) and o.is_user_del = 0 and o.level = 1 where od.is_receipt = 1 and od.is_reply = 0 and od.uid = #{userId} and od.product_type in (0,2,4,5,6)

select IFNULL(sum(od.pay_price - od.refund_price), 0.00) from eb_order_detail od right join eb_order o on o.order_no = od.order_no where o.paid = 1 and o.level = 1 and od.mer_id = #{merId} and od.uid = #{userId}
